title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout, a cloud cost management SaaS company with 100+ employees across Tel Aviv and New York, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations reporting to the CRO. Requires 7+ years in RevOps, Sales Ops, or Strategy within high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and strong cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. A hands-on leader-doer who can own executive strategy while building flows, dashboards, and data models, collaborating across time zones with the Tel Aviv HQ.
_note: Posting mentions <cite index="4-13,4-14">trusted by brands like The New York Times, Wiz, Elastic, SiriusXM, and Lyft, backed by investors with over $85M raised, grown to 100+ people across Tel Aviv and New York</cite>.
score_reason: Omri is an exceptional match—15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps, deep Salesforce expertise, proven scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, and strong cross-functional leadership align perfectly with the Head of RevOps role. The Tel Aviv/New York hybrid setup with HQ in Tel Aviv is ideal for his location preferences.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Finout's Head of RevOps opening and your profile immediately stood out as a natural fit. With your 15+ years scaling B2B SaaS GTM operations and hands-on Salesforce mastery, you'd bring exactly the strategic + execution blend their CRO needs as they scale cloud cost management. The Tel Aviv/NYC hybrid model seems built for someone like you who thrives across time zones and markets.

title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Render, a modern cloud platform for developers building AI-native, full-stack applications, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations. The role requires 8–12 years in Revenue Operations, Sales Strategy, or GTM Operations, ideally at a B2B SaaS company with a PLG motion layered with enterprise sales, plus proven experience building RevOps infrastructure from the ground up. This is a foundational leadership role owning the operational backbone of Render's go-to-market engine.
score_reason: Exceptional alignment: 15+ years exceeds the 8-12 year requirement, AI-native GTM and B2B SaaS are core strengths, and the foundational RevOps infrastructure build matches Omri's senior leadership profile. Remote location is ideal.
ai_opener: Omri here—I've spent 15 years building RevOps infrastructure for B2B SaaS companies scaling PLG+enterprise motions, and Render's mission to power AI-native full-stack development resonates deeply. Your Head of Revenue Operations role reads like the exact operational architecture challenge I've built and scaled multiple times. I'd love to explore how I can own that go-to-market backbone for your team.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: Gong, a revenue intelligence platform, seeks a RevOps Manager focused on Territory Strategy & Operations. Requires 3–5+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Strategy, or GTM planning, deep understanding of B2B SaaS go-to-market models and territory segmentation, strong analytical skills (Excel, SQL, BI tools like Tableau/Retool), and Salesforce proficiency. You'll redesign territory models for global scalability, maintain territory mapping in tools like Fullcast and Salesforce, and partner with Sales leadership and Finance on territory compositions and rep capacity modeling.
score_reason: Excellent alignment with Omri's 15+ years B2B SaaS RevOps expertise, territory strategy focus, Salesforce proficiency, and analytical skillset. Role is senior-level RevOps with strategic GTM planning—perfectly matches target profile.
ai_opener: Omri here—I've spent 15+ years building revenue operations functions in B2B SaaS, and Gong's territory intelligence platform caught my attention. Territory segmentation and rep capacity modeling are areas where I've driven significant scalability gains, and I'd be interested in exploring how my GTM strategy background could support Gong's next phase of global expansion.

title: RevOps Manager
description: Instrumentl, a YC-backed fundraising automation SaaS for nonprofits, seeks a RevOps Manager to own the technical infrastructure powering its revenue engine. This builder role involves architecting the CRM data model, integrating data sources, and leading AI tool implementation across sales processes. Requires 3–5+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Ops, Marketing Ops, or GTM Systems at a B2B SaaS company, strong technical skills (SQL, complex workflows, APIs), hands-on CRM administration (HubSpot preferred), and data architecture/integration experience. Target salary band $120,000–$170,000 USD plus equity.
score_reason: Strong technical RevOps fit with 15+ years B2B SaaS experience, HubSpot expertise, and AI-native GTM background. The role's emphasis on CRM architecture, data integration, and AI implementation aligns perfectly with Omri's core strengths, though the 3-5 year requirement is well below his seniority level.
ai_opener: I've spent 15+ years building revenue infrastructure for B2B SaaS companies, and Instrumentl's vision of automating nonprofit fundraising resonates deeply—especially your focus on AI-native GTM and technical RevOps foundations. Your CRM architecture and data integration challenges are exactly the kind of systems work I've architected at scale, and I'd welcome a conversation about how I could accelerate your revenue engine beyond the scope of a traditional RevOps Manager role.

title: GTM Engineer
description: Conveo is an AI research platform enabling fast, affordable, high-quality consumer/B2B research, used by global brands like Unilever, Google, and Orange. As a GTM Engineer, you'll replace manual workflows and tribal knowledge with purpose-built apps, pipelines, and AI-powered workflows. The role involves building lead scoring models that learn, attribution pipelines, onboarding flows that activate customers faster, and AI agents that eliminate hours of manual work. Ideal for someone who can code, ship, and iterate on internal tools as the company scales rapidly.
score_reason: Strong alignment on GTM Engineer title, AI-native workflows, and lead scoring/attribution expertise. However, the role's emphasis on coding and building internal tools as a core responsibility may not be ideal for a RevOps executive whose strength lies in process design, tool orchestration, and cross-functional leadership rather than hands-on engineering.
ai_opener: Conveo's mission to automate research workflows at scale resonates with my 15+ years building AI-powered GTM systems. Your focus on eliminating manual work through purpose-built pipelines and lead scoring models aligns perfectly with how I've architected attribution and activation systems. I'd be interested in exploring how my RevOps/GTM expertise could accelerate your go-to-market engine.
